title: Add prefix DAO routing vectors
description: Create independently derived typed vectors for Target codec and routing outcomes: /0,/64,/127,/128, noncanonical host bits, overlap/LPM, grouped transits, replay, expiry, withdrawal, multiparent, capacity, owner path, and SRH destination preservation.
acceptance_criteria: Schema represents prefix key, owner, destination, expected route/path, lifecycle and rejection/no-mutation outcomes; C/Python/Rust consume the same vectors.
